# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:imperial_preference = {
	trigger = {
		scope:selected_identity = identity:identity_trade_league
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		c:GBR ?=this
	}
}

REPLACE:balmoral_conference = {
	trigger = {
	    c:GBR ?= this
	    RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
	}
}

REPLACE:pact_of_windsor = {
	trigger = {
	    c:GBR ?= this
	    RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
	}
}

REPLACE:sublime_alliance = {
	trigger = {
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		c:TUR ?= this
	}
}
